title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 discusses why AI still struggles reliably with document editing tasks that humans perform easily. The core issue is that .docx files operate as structured programs with internal logic rather than plain text, requiring AI to treat documents as software rather than static files to scale trustworthy edits.
